properties.body:
[Northern Baltic] FINNISH NAV WARN 366/26
UNDERWATER DIVING OPERATIONS ARE TEMPORARILY PAUSED DUE TO WEATHER IN VICINITY OF 59-26.0N 021-04.5E.
SEVERAL MARKER BUOYS ARE ANCHORED IN THE AREA. THE DANGER AREA IS MARKED WITH A VIRTUAL AIS NAMED DIVING 1.4 NM CPA.
MARINERS ARE REQUESTED TO KEEP SHARP LOOKOUT AND MINIMUM DISTANCE OF 1.4 NM FROM THE AREA.”
